title: Left menu wider
excerpt:
It would be nice if it’s possible to make the menu on the left as wide and as narrow as you want. 
Now you only have the choice to hide an show it. It is not possible now to read the whole name of the boards.

posts.author: AvL (Anne)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice if it’s possible to make the menu on the left as wide and as narrow as you want.
Now you only have the choice to hide an show it. It is not possible now to read the whole name of the boards.
